<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Disconnect account connector authorization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/accounts/{account_id}/oauth2/connectors/{connector_id}/authorization"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Disconnect an OAuth2 Data Source connector from an account.

  as={"h2"}
